diagnostic_conclusion.reason: Active-panel models had near-zero sampled-frame recall. The wire-mesh detector fired on static/resident material and either overcounted fragmentation or undercounted after aggressive suppression.

next_required_input_or_work: Fill data/reports/img2628_human_truth_event_times.reviewed_v1.csv with reviewed timestamps for all 25 countable placements.
Optionally fill data/reports/img2628_human_truth_review_worksheet.cv_motion_draft_v1.csv and run scripts/convert_truth_review_worksheet_to_csv.py to produce the reviewed timestamp CSV.
Build or obtain an IMG_2628-capable active-panel detector/settings candidate from reviewed labels or another reviewed data path.
Only then run a visible 1.0x dashboard proof and compare to the reviewed truth ledger.
objective: Validate IMG_2628.MOV to the project definition of done: human truth artifacts, reviewed timestamp ledger, real visible 1.0x app/dashboard run, clean app-vs-truth comparison to 25 events, measured pacing, and updated documentation without using Moondream as validation truth.

success_criteria.requirement: Human reference total for IMG_2628 is recorded as 25.

success_criteria.notes: An empty human template, review aids, and a Codex visual draft ledger exist. The Codex draft has validation_truth_eligible=false/training_eligible=false and does not satisfy promotion. A reviewed 25-event CSV/ledger is still missing.
success_criteria.requirement: Reviewed timestamp truth ledger exists for all 25 completed placements.

success_criteria.notes: All 22 labels are bronze/pending, validation_truth_eligible=false, and training_eligible=false. The output was checked with scripts/check_dataset_poisoning.py as teacher labels only.
success_criteria.requirement: Moondream 2 is used only as offline/local advisory review acceleration, not validation truth or training data.

success_criteria.notes: The real app path was used for accelerated diagnostics, but there is no valid visible 1.0x promotion run.
success_criteria.requirement: Real app proof uses FC_DEMO_COUNT_MODE=live_reader_snapshot and FC_COUNTING_MODE=event_based.

success_criteria.notes: No visible dashboard proof was run because diagnostics did not produce a defensible detector/settings candidate.
success_criteria.requirement: Visible dashboard run at 1.0x starts Runtime Total at 0, shows IMG_2628.MOV, and ends at Runtime Total 25.

success_criteria.notes: Cannot run a valid comparison without both reviewed timestamp truth and a visible 1.0x app run.
success_criteria.requirement: Captured observed app events compare cleanly against reviewed truth with matched_count=25, missing_truth_count=0, unexpected_observed_count=0, first_divergence=null.

success_criteria.notes: Only accelerated diagnostic runs exist; they cannot satisfy the 1.0x proof requirement.
success_criteria.requirement: Wall/source pacing is measured near 1.0 for the promotion run.

success_criteria.notes: Documentation explicitly says IMG_2628 is not verified, records the next honest command for reviewed truth, and now records that current counting readiness is blocked.
success_criteria.requirement: Documentation and handoff are updated with current status and next command.

success_criteria.notes: No IMG_2628 registry entry was added because the candidate is blocked.
success_criteria.requirement: Registry/manifests are updated only if the candidate satisfies the real app proof boundary.
